patches_added.name: Anti Edit
patches_added.description: Prevent others from editing sent messages.

patches_added.name: Anti Expiration
patches_added.description: Bypass WhatsApp forced version and expiration verification.

patches_added.name: Anti View Once
patches_added.description: View ephemeral media without limits and allow screenshots.

patches_added.name: Copy Statuses
patches_added.description: Allow copying text from contact statuses.

patches_added.name: Ghost Mode
patches_added.description: Do not receive or send messages while active.

patches_added.name: Hide Forwarded
patches_added.description: Quita la etiqueta "reenviado" de los mensajes.

patches_added.name: Hide Read Receipts
patches_added.description: Read messages without sending blue ticks.

patches_added.name: Spoof Installer
patches_added.description: Fake installation from Google Play to avoid restrictions.

patches_removed.name: Anti Editar
patches_removed.description: Evita que otros editen mensajes enviados.

patches_removed.name: Anti Expiracion
patches_removed.description: Evita la verificacion forzada de version y expiracion de WhatsApp.

patches_removed.name: Anti-View Once
patches_removed.description: Ve medios efímeros sin límite y permite capturas.

patches_removed.name: Copiar estados
patches_removed.description: Permite copiar texto de estados de contactos.

patches_removed.name: Modo Fantasma
patches_removed.description: No recibes ni envias mensajes mientras este activo.

patches_removed.name: Ocultar lectura
patches_removed.description: Lee mensajes sin enviar ticks azules.

patches_removed.name: Ocultar reenviado
patches_removed.description: Quita la etiqueta "reenviado" de los mensajes.

patches_removed.name: Spoof instalador
patches_removed.description: Finge instalación desde Google Play para evitar restricciones.

patches_modified.name: Anti Detector
patches_modified.description: Bypass root, emulator, and custom ROM detection.

patches_modified.name: Anti Revoke
patches_modified.description: Prevent others from deleting their messages or statuses.

patches_modified.name: HD Media
patches_modified.description: Send images and videos without compression.

patches_modified.name: Settings Menu
patches_modified.description: Add the Pichiwa menu in settings.
